episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 515: Braindead X Secret Lair Chaos Drop
episode.description:
James and Cliff walk you through all the latest in Magic price movement, take a look at the latest meta results for Pioneer and Modern, and cough up some great cards to watch. In our final segments the boys review the latest Secret Lair x Braindead chaos drop.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
